about.title: About Me
about.p1: Self-taught Mid-Level Full-stack Engineer with hands-on experience designing and delivering production-grade SaaS applications from the ground up, skilled in backend, frontend, cloud infrastructure, AI-powered systems, authentication, observability, asynchronous processing, and CI/CD. Comfortable across the entire stack — building async Python/FastAPI backends with Clean Architecture, React/Next.js frontends, PostgreSQL data models, Redis caching layers, and cloud deployments on AWS/Vercel/Railway. Recently focused on integrating LLM-powered agents (LangChain, CrewAI) into real products, including a fraud-detection pipeline and a multi-tenant intelligent automation platform. Currently seeking an international remote role where I can make a meaningful contribution to a fast-moving team and keep growing.

psi: 4-stage AI fraud detection pipeline processing real financial documents in production
Multi-agent system with CrewAI — Gemini, DeepSeek & OpenAI orchestration with skeptical-by-default design
3-method PDF extraction cascade (PyMuPDF primary) for maximum document coverage
FastAPI + Clean Architecture + PostgreSQL + Alembic — scalable, auditable backend
RAG system for legal contextualization of agent analyses
Internationalized frontend with Next.js + next-intl + full CI/CD
LGPD compliance through DPIA documentation and privacy policies
Restructured multi-agent pipeline for reliable, modular inter-agent communication
NextAuth authentication with session persistence and App Router middleware
Fixed OCR and extraction inconsistencies — significantly improved analysis quality
Full observability with Sentry, Prometheus, Grafana, and PostHog in production
pytomatiza: Full Stack architecture using Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and Docker
Intelligent pipelines with CrewAI and LangChain
Configurable tools for creating custom agents
System ready for multiple automation domains
Automated deployment using Railway, Vercel, and GitHub Actions
Fixed Railway deployment issues, including Pyright-related build blocks
Resolved frontend-backend integration failures caused by incorrect endpoint configurations
Refactored authentication flow and inter-service communication for improved stability
Standardized Docker infrastructure for consistency between local development and production
Adjusted health checks, environment variables, and agent configurations for reliable deployments
clark: Full-featured player for local audio files
Virtualized lists using react-window for large music libraries
Automatic metadata enrichment using MusicBrainz, Spotify, iTunes, and Genius
Redis session management + Resend email authentication
Resolved complex layout conflicts with Sidebar, PlayerBar, and overlapping components using Zustand
Refactored shared state architecture to eliminate inconsistencies across application areas
Optimized rendering performance through list virtualization for large music libraries
Integrated multiple metadata APIs creating a unified enrichment layer for track information
Adjusted session management and authentication issues using Redis and Resend
Created user traffic with UpTimeRobot, preventing the backend deploy server from going idle and causing errors and delays in catalog retrieval within the app
facilit: Full Z-API integration for WhatsApp communication
Mobile app built with React Native (Expo)
Completely migrated the frontend from Kivy to React Native (Expo)
Resolved complex npm ecosystem dependency conflicts during migration
Restructured frontend-backend-WhatsApp communication for automated service stability
Refactored agent flow to produce more organized and consistent conversation responses
eude_ramos: Metadata configured for better search engine indexing
Automated deployment on Vercel with GitHub CI/CD
